segments.text:
open nms vulnerabilities securing code
against attackers unexpected ways open

nms is a popular Enterprise grade
monitoring solution the sonar

vulnerability research team discover
critical vulnerability in open nms an

unauthenticated attacker can leverage
this vulnerability to inject a

JavaScript payload in the admin
dashboard which exploits another

vulnerability in the application to
execute arbitrary code on the open M
server once an admin views the

dashboard the vulnerabilities were fixed
in open nms version

3104 read all the technical details on
this vulnerability on this owners

source.com blog and remember
always sanitize since code is constantly

evolving over time old assumptions may
become invalid

fullText:
[Music] open nms vulnerabilities securing code
against attackers unexpected ways open nms is a popular Enterprise grade
monitoring solution the sonar vulnerability research team discover
critical vulnerability in open nms an unauthenticated attacker can leverage
this vulnerability to inject a JavaScript payload in the admin
dashboard which exploits another vulnerability in the application to
execute arbitrary code on the open M server once an admin views the dashboard the vulnerabilities were fixed
in open nms version 3104 read all the technical details on
this vulnerability on this owners source.com blog and remember
always sanitize since code is constantly evolving over time old assumptions may
become invalid
